rationale: No headlines directly affect Portugal this cycle; the US-Iran deal uncertainty has a mild indirect effect on energy prices relevant to Portuguese households.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal uncertainty and Israel strikes Beirut
top_events.summary: Unresolved US-Iran deal and new Israeli strikes on Beirut keep global energy markets uncertain, with a mild indirect effect on Portuguese energy and fuel costs.

top_events.title: Switzerland rejects population cap referendum
top_events.summary: Swiss voters rejected a right-wing bid to cap the country's population at 10 million, preserving free movement norms within broader European context — minimal direct impact on Portugal.
